offline_build.note: tsc -b typecheck + vite production build of the seeded reference-app; 421 modules transformed, no errors. Confirms the seed compiles.

live_validation.blocker: deepbook-sandbox deploy fails — `pnpm deploy-all --quick` cannot publish the token package (`sui client test-publish` -> 'Failed to publish token'). The sandbox's Move packages emit deprecation/unknown-lint warnings against the locally-installed sui CLI, suggesting CLI-vs-package version drift in the deepbook-sandbox repo.
live_validation.blocker_repo: MystenLabs/deepbook-sandbox (separate repo; not part of this lesson)
live_validation.consequence: This lesson is live-gated (final_verification runs `pnpm vitest run` against a running sandbox). With no healthy sandbox, the two live tests (positive base-out swap; minOut revert / MoveAbort 12) cannot be executed, and the Step 7 dual-output-mode learner sub-agent pass was not run.

known_issues: Live validation pending: re-run `pnpm deploy-all --quick` in deepbook-sandbox once the token-publish issue is resolved, then `cd reference-app && pnpm vitest run` and dispatch the dual-mode learner validation before considering this lesson shippable.
